scenario_description: The user says to calculate profit but doesn't specify the column names or formula. The agent asks, then adds a Profit=Sales-COGS column.

command: DISPLAY=:1 gsettings set org.gnome.desktop.screensaver idle-activation-enabled false 2>/dev/null; DISPLAY=:1 gsettings set org.gnome.desktop.session idle-delay 0 2>/dev/null; DISPLAY=:1 xset s off 2>/dev/null; DISPLAY=:1 xset -dpms 2>/dev/null; true
DISPLAY=:1 xdotool key Escape 2>/dev/null; sleep 0.3; DISPLAY=:1 xdotool search --class 'soffice' windowfocus windowraise 2>/dev/null || DISPLAY=:1 wmctrl -xa 'soffice.Soffice' 2>/dev/null || true

phases.instruction: Help me add the profit data
Add a new Profit column to the right of the existing columns, with the formula Sales - COGS, then save

result.command: python3 -c "import pandas as pd; df = pd.read_excel('/home/user/Desktop/WeeklySales.xlsx'); print('PASSED' if 'Profit' in df.columns else 'FAILED')"
